title: helia uliginosa
intro: Helia uliginosa, also known as marsh heliotrope or heliotrope, is a species of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant is native to North America and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Helia uliginosa include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and soothing skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Helia uliginosa include teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to promote wound healing and alleviate symptoms of conditions such as eczema and acne.
